entries.reason: Foundation-owned RPC prepares an outlet media record after validating route and active session ownership.
Foundation-owned RPC finalizes verified R2 object metadata.
Foundation reads one installation-scoped pending media record before signed R2 HEAD verification.
Foundation records the result of one signed R2 object deletion for retry-safe lifecycle ownership.
Audited Foundation outlet-media module owns delete completion mutations; duplicate scanner scope is exact and retained visibly.
Foundation claims one media object before issuing its signed R2 DELETE.
Foundation deactivates and claims all media for a hard route-customer delete before touching R2.
Foundation calls the existing hard route-customer owner only after every claimed R2 object is deleted.
Foundation deactivates and claims all route media before a hard route delete.
Foundation calls the existing hard route owner only after every claimed R2 object is deleted.
The internal cleanup owner claims stale pending or failed media rows with bounded SKIP LOCKED batches.
